stemHtml: An aircraft registered in France is executing a flight from Paris, France to Santiago, Chile. When should the aircraft follow the European Rules of the Air (SERA)?

options.a: All the time, even if the local rules conflict with SERA.
options.b: All the time, except when the SERA regulations conflict with those from the state overflying.
options.c: Only over European Airspace, but not over other states.
